use_cases: Displaying product features with animated hover states in SaaS dashboards
Creating interactive content cards for e-commerce product listings
Building feature highlight sections with visual content areas
Designing responsive card grids with dark mode support
Showcasing media or content previews with customizable visual sections
ai_summary: A reusable animated card component from the 21st.dev design system featuring a clean, flat visual style with dark mode support. The card includes modular sub-components for title, description, body content, and visual areas. Designed with Tailwind group utilities for hover animations and glow effects, making it ideal for interactive content displays in SaaS, e-commerce, and media applications.
